summary: Frontend-only testing of the 'Love Your Serger' static React marketing landing page. All 14 sections render in the correct order. All 6 visible CTAs use the exact text 'BUY NOW', link to the exact digistore24 URL with target=_blank and rel='noopener noreferrer'. No pricing, currency symbols, or forbidden words detected anywhere in the rendered DOM. FAQ + Objections accordions (Radix single-collapsible) function correctly. All testimonial (1-6), module (1-8), and project (1-9) cards render with valid your-creatory.com image sources. Sticky mobile bar is fixed to bottom on 390px viewport and hidden on desktop; header BUY NOW is desktop-only. Zero console errors on load.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: data-testid='project-image-N' is placed on the

Minor: BuyNowButton renders an <a> tag styled as a button — good for SEO/UX, but be aware aria-label says 'Buy Now — opens secure checkout in a new tab' while the visible text is 'BUY NOW'. Screen readers will read both. Acceptable but could be unified.

All other code follows requirements: single CTA component, centralized CTA_URL constant, no hardcoded pricing/currency, semantic sections with data-testids, Radix Accordion for FAQ/Objections, Tailwind responsive utilities for sticky bar visibility.
test_credentials: N/A — static marketing page, no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested at https://serger-mastery.preview.emergentagent.com/ on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. The 6 BUY NOW CTAs are: header-buy-now-btn, hero-buy-now-btn, introducing-buy-now-btn, testimonials-buy-now-btn, guarantee-buy-now-btn, final-close-buy-now-btn (+ sticky-mobile-buy-now-btn on mobile). All link to https://www.digistore24.com/product/561361?currency=USD&utm_campaign=spabcontrolvaa. Note: CTA_URL itself contains 'currency=USD' as a tracking param — this is in href only, not visible to users, so the 'no pricing/USD in visible text' rule is preserved. FAQ uses Radix single-collapsible (correct per spec).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found requiring RCA. Initial test script reported project-images as failing — root cause was the testid being on
